Brand.name: Blackcrest
Brand.tagline: Investment documents, controlled to the page

Auth.registerSubtitle: Accounts are approved manually by the Blackcrest team.
Auth.name: Full name
Auth.pendingNotice: Your request has been recorded and is awaiting approval.
Auth.accountLocked: Account locked after too many failed sign-ins. Please try again in 15 minutes.
Auth.loginPledge: Every report reaching an investor has been approved, digitally signed and audit-trailed.
Auth.registerPledge: Access is granted manually — the right people, the right documents, at the right time.
Auth.panelTagline: Document portal for private wealth management
Auth.passwordHint: Use uppercase letters, numbers and special characters.

Landing.heroHeadline: Investment documents, controlled to every page
Landing.heroSubtitle: Blackcrest issues, approves and distributes confidential investment reports to investors — in a single workflow that is precise and fast.
Landing.heroMicrocopy: Institutional-grade security compliance · No credit card required
Landing.feature1Body: Every report moves through draft → review → publish, with a complete audit trail.
Landing.feature2Body: SUPER_ADMIN, EDITOR and APPROVER permissions. Dynamic watermarks on every PDF page.
Landing.feature3Body: View, annotate and navigate documents with sub-180ms latency on every action.
Landing.workflowHeading: From draft to investor, with no step left out of control
Landing.workflowIntro: Every document passes through four clear states. Role-based permissions determine who drafts, who approves and who views — all recorded for audit.
Landing.step1Body: Editors upload the PDF and assign a category and access level to each document.
Landing.step2Body: Approvers review the content, leave notes and decide — all on a single screen.
Landing.step3Body: Each decision is time-stamped and recorded in the audit log.
Landing.step4Body: Entitled investors receive the document with a per-session dynamic watermark.
Landing.clientQuote: “For the first time, distributing reports to investors is clean and auditable. Blackcrest replaced an entire scattered email process with a single portal.”
Landing.ctaHeading: Ready for a best-in-class document workflow?
Landing.ctaBody: Talk to the Blackcrest team to set up a dedicated investor portal for your fund.

Portal.recentSummary: You have {count} recent documents in your library.
Portal.emptyRecent: No documents available for you yet.

Library.title: Document library
Library.description: All documents distributed to you, sorted by publication date.

Viewer.confidentialDocumentNote: This document is restricted to authorized investors. Please do not copy or redistribute it.
Viewer.accessPolicyPublic: All approved investors can view this document.
Viewer.accessPolicyRestricted: Only authorized investor groups can view this document. Every view and download is logged.
Viewer.approveDialogDescription: The report will move to Approved status and be ready to publish to investors.
Viewer.rejectDialogDescription: The document will be returned to the editor with the reason.
Viewer.rejectNotePlaceholder: Transaction figures need to be added…
Viewer.publishDialogDescription: The report will be published to entitled investor groups and recorded in the audit log.
Viewer.publishedToastMessage: Entitled investors can now view the document.
Viewer.approvedToastMessage: The report is ready to publish to investors.
Viewer.reviewError: Could not update the report status.
Viewer.downloadLinkError: Could not generate the download link.

Admin.entitlementsIntro: Grant access to each investor group by category or by a specific report. Each grant records exactly one target and is written to the audit log.
Admin.emptyGroupsDescription: Create an investor group before granting access by category or report.
Admin.emptyEntitlementsDescription: This group has not been granted any entitlements.
Admin.uploadSubtitle: The PDF is validated, watermarked and distributed per entitlement.
Admin.uploadDuplicate: This file already exists — reusing the existing report.
Admin.uploadNotPdf: Only valid PDF files are accepted.
Admin.uploadCorrupted: The uploaded file was incomplete. Please try again.
Admin.uploadInvalidData: Invalid details. Check the required fields.
Admin.uploadDraftNote: Documents are saved as Draft; publishing is done by an Approver.

Errors.errorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again; if it persists, contact the Blackcrest team.
Errors.notFoundDesc: The page or document you are looking for does not exist, or you do not have access.
